---
title: "FAIR Data Principles & Biodiversity Standards"
subtitle: "Why and how to publish FAIR data"
author: "Elizabeth Lawrence, Saara Suominen"
date: 2026-07-21
---

{{< include slides/_34-FAIR-data.qmd >}}

{{< include slides/_35-what-can-FAIR-do.qmd >}}

{{< include slides/_36-how-FAIR.qmd >}}

{{< include slides/_01-what-is-obis.qmd >}}

{{< include slides/_02-mature-global-community.qmd >}}     

{{< include slides/_37-obis-fair.qmd >}}

{{< include slides/_38a_interject-question.qmd >}}

{{< include slides/_38-intro-darwin-core.qmd >}}

{{< include slides/_39-relational-databases.qmd >}}

{{< include slides/_40-core-and-extensions.qmd >}}

{{< include slides/_41-sensitive-data.qmd >}}   

{{< include slides/_42-eov.qmd >}}  

{{< include slides/_53-why-fair.qmd >}}
